name: Autonomous Plugin Generator
description: Write, install, and fix dynamic python plugins to expand your own capabilities. Use 'create' to write a new tool when you lack a capability. Expected parameters: action ('create' or 'fix'), tool_name, description, code (must contain execute function), and error_message (for fixing).

action.description: The action: 'create' for new tools, 'fix' for healing broken tools.

tool_name.description: The unique name of the tool (e.g., 'usd_to_cny'). Required for both actions.

description.description: A clear description of what the tool does. Required for 'create'.

code.description: The full Python code for 'index.py'. MUST contain a 'def execute(params: dict, context: dict) -> dict:' function. Code MUST be cross-platform (use os.path, platform.system()). Required for 'create' and 'fix'.

error_message.description: The traceback or error message from the failed tool execution. Required for 'fix'.
